hub.title: Family Hub
hub.noChildren: No children linked to this account yet.
hub.noChildrenHint: Your studio admin will link your dancer(s) to you.
hub.classesEnrolled: {count, plural, one {# class enrolled} other {# classes enrolled}}
hub.addChildDescription: Create a profile for your child and link them to your account.

shop.title: Studio Shop
shop.orderConfirmedHint: Your items have been reserved. The studio will confirm shortly.
shop.paymentStartFailed: Could not start payment. Please try again.

events.qrHint: Present this QR code at the door. A copy is saved to your account.
events.cardAtCheckout: Card payment is collected at checkout.
events.paymentStartFailed: Could not start payment. Please try again.

autoPay.title: Auto-pay
autoPay.subtitle: Set up monthly tuition so fees are charged automatically — no more chasing invoices.
autoPay.endingHint: Auto-pay will stop at the end of the current period.
autoPay.confirmHint: Your card is saved and charged monthly. Cancel any time.

enroll.title: Enrollment
enroll.spotsLeft: {count, plural, one {# spot left} other {# spots left}}
enroll.waiversIntro: Please read and accept the following on behalf of {name}.
enroll.agreeWaiver: I agree to the {title} on behalf of my child.
enroll.payNowHint: Your dancer is already enrolled. Complete payment here, or choose pay later to finish without paying now.
enroll.paymentChoiceHint: Payment isn't required to enrol right now. Pay later to confirm without paying, pay the full term now, or split your account balance across 3 monthly payments.
enroll.termAccountTotalHint: Including other open invoices, your account total is {total}.
enroll.termMonthlyOptionHint: Or split across {count} monthly payments from {amount} (includes all open invoices on your account).
enroll.termPayNowHint: This is the first monthly instalment. The remaining payments will be due each month on your Billing page.
enroll.termPaidHint: First instalment of {amount} received. {count} monthly payments in total — pay the rest anytime from Billing.
enroll.payLaterHint: You're enrolled! An invoice for {amount} is on your account — pay anytime from Billing or at the studio.
enroll.paidOnlineHint: Payment of {amount} received. You're all set!
enroll.programIncludedHint: No extra charge — {className} is already covered by your enrolment on another day.
enroll.waitlistedBody: {name} is on the waitlist for {className}. You'll be notified when a spot opens.
enroll.invoiceHint: An invoice for {amount} will appear in your account shortly.

email.title: Studio email
email.subtitle: Email between you and {studioName}. Saved here for your records — separate from the studio admin inbox.
email.emptyThreads: No studio emails saved yet. When {studioName} emails you from their connected inbox, copies appear here.

childProgress.emptyProgress: No progress logged yet. Your instructor will update this as your dancer progresses.

chat.title: Studio chat
chat.subtitle: Reach the studio admin or your child's teachers.
chat.selectDescription: Billing, absences, and general questions go to the studio admin. You can also message your teachers directly.
chat.noContacts: Messaging is not available yet — please contact the studio by email.
chat.internalChannel: Messages are sent securely to the studio team.

billing.label: Billing & payments
billing.subtitle: Billing enquiry
billing.placeholder: I have a question about my invoice or payment…

absence.label: Report an absence
absence.hint: Let us know when your dancer will be away
absence.subtitle: Absence notice
absence.placeholder: My dancer will be absent on…

billing.title: Billing & payments
billing.subtitle: Pay invoices, review receipts, and manage auto-pay for tuition.
billing.portalFailed: Could not open the payment portal. Try again or contact the studio.
billing.stripeNotConfigured: Online payments are not configured for this studio yet. Contact the studio to pay by other methods.
billing.termPlanTitle: Pay your term in 3 monthly instalments
billing.termPlanIntro: Split your outstanding balance of {total} into {count} monthly payments of about {installment}. All open invoices on your account are combined.
billing.termPlanActiveHint: You are on a payment plan ({paid} of {total} instalments paid). Next payment: {next}.
billing.termPaySubtitle: Your open invoices are combined and split across the term.
billing.termPayExplain: We will total everything on your account and charge the next monthly instalment securely by card.
billing.termPayFailed: Could not start the payment plan. Try again or contact the studio.

schedule.title: Family schedule
schedule.subtitle: Weekly classes and studio updates for your dancers.
schedule.legend: Recurring classes come from enrolments. Extra items are added by studio staff.
